Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('PDV_M', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &AutNiv) &DeliverVarchar = 'N' if &AutNiv = 0 btnMonitoraPDV.Visible = 0 btnInsert.Visible = 0 &DeliverVarchar = 'S' RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWMONITORADELIVERY', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) Endif LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DeliverVarchar.Visible = False &EmpCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PedSts = nullvalue(&PedSts) &PedStsFin = nullvalue(&PedStsFin) &PedBlq = nullvalue(&PedBlq) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Lançamento Pedidos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Pedido Decrescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Pedido Crescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Ficha') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Pedido') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Emissão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Estoque') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Financ.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Líquido ') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'Lcto') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() and &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - 30 &PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh &OldPedCliCod = &PedCliCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon010_LiberarCreditoPedido, &LiberaCreditoPedido) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon009_FecharComEstoque, &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon041_FecharIntergradoFinanceiro, &FechamentoIntegradoEstoque) EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &AlterarPedido.FromImage(ActionUpdate) &AlterarPedido.TooltipText = "" &comboAcoes.Clear() &comboAcoes.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If ((LctAtuSal <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum)) &comboAcoes.AddItem(1, 'Emitir NFe') Endif If ((LctAtuSal <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum)) &comboAcoes.AddItem(2, 'Emitir NFCe') Endif If (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) &comboAcoes.AddItem(3, 'Abrir Estoque') Endif If (not PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO)) &comboAcoes.AddItem(4, 'Fechar Estoque') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO) &comboAcoes.AddItem(5, 'Fechar Financeiro') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.FECHADO) &comboAcoes.AddItem(6, 'Alterar Financeiro') Endif &comboAcoes.AddItem(7, 'Críticas Pedido') If (PedSts <> 'F' and PedSts <> 'C') &comboAcoes.AddItem(8, 'Cancelar Pedido') Endif If (PedSts <> 'C') &comboAcoes.AddItem(9, 'Histórico') Endif &EnviarEmail = !'' &ImprimirPedido = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ PedCliCodRaz.Link = VerPedido.Link('wwPedidoPDV', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO &AlterarPedido.FromImage(ActionDisplay) &AlterarPedido.TooltipText = "Visualizar Pedido" &AlterarPedido.Link = VerPedido.Link('wwPedidoPdv', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else &AlterarPedido.FromImage(ActionUpdate) &AlterarPedido.TooltipText = "GXM_update" if &DeliverVarchar = 'S' &AlterarPedido.Link = wwpdelivery_1.Link('WWMONITORADELIVERY', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, 0) Else &AlterarPedido.Link = pdvm_venda.Link(PedCod) Endif Endif If LctTip = TipoLancamento.OrcamentoVenda PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Else PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIF EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &comboAcoes.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &comboAcoes = 1 Do 'Do EmitirNFe' Case &comboAcoes = 2 Do 'Do EmitirNFCe' Case &comboAcoes = 3 Do 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' Case &comboAcoes = 4 Do 'Do FecharEstoquePedido' Case &comboAcoes = 5 Do 'Do FecharFinanceiroPedido' Case &comboAcoes = 6 Do 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' Case &comboAcoes = 7 Do 'Do Criticaspedido' Case &comboAcoes = 8 Do 'Do CancelarPedido' Case &comboAcoes = 9 Do 'Do HistoricoCliente' EndCase &comboAcoes = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpAbrirPedidoVenda.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Criticaspedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcCriticasDoPedido.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' 2 RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon086_SolicitarClientePDV, &TCon086_SolicitarClientePDV) if &TCon086_SolicitarClientePDV = 'S' Pdvm_addCliente.Link(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &AuxPedCod,0) Else GravaCapaPedidoPDV.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, 0, 0, &Context.PesCod, Pedido_Gerado.PDV, 0, &AuxPedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ pdvm_venda.Call(&AuxPedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndEvent Event 'DoMonitoraPDV' 7 pdv_m.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMonitoraDelivery' wwMonitoraDelivery.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoTotalizar' RetornaTotalPedidosVendaGrid.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &PedSts, &PedStsFin, &PedCliCod, &PedStsCrd, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaEms_To, &PedDtaFat1, &PedDtaFat_To1, &LctCod1, &PedVenCod1,'V', &FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) //wpTotalizaPedidos.Popup(&FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Totalizar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Totalizar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpTotalizaPedidos.Create(&FinMedioMoeda, &medioMoeda, &PedidoMoeda, &QtdPedidos, &FinQtdPedido, &FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwPedidoPDV.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwwPedidoPDV.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EmitirNFe' If PedCliBlqNfe = Status_simNao.Sim Msg('Atenção! Cliente com emissão fiscal bloqueado no cadastro, procure saber o motivo antes de desbloquear!') Else &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 &IsSemEstoque = false If &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' //FECHA PEDIDO SOMENTE COM ESTOQUE &IsSemEstoque = VerificaProdutoSemEstoque.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIf Do Case Case &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' and &IsSemEstoque = true msg('No pedido existe produtos que não possuem estoque suficiente! [CONF58]') Case &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' and (PedCliCrd <> 999999999.99) and (PedStsCrd <> Status_Autorizado.AUTORIZADO and LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim)//Não Liberado Para Faturamento msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta Liberação do Crédito! [CONF23]') Case LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum msg('Pedido em Operação que não atualiza saldos, não permitido para fazer nota!') Case (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) And (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) msg('Somente pedidos com o status estoque "ABERTO" ou "SEPARANDO" pode fazer nota!') Otherwise //if PedSts = 'S' // // volta status do pedido para aberto, para poder fazer a nota fiscal // call(PSICRT54 ,FilCod,PedSeq,0,0,'A',&SicFunCod,0) //EndIf //&PedStsRet = PedSts GravaNotaTemporariaVenda.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, '55') wpSelecionaProdutosNFe.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndCase Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EmitirNFCe' If PedCliBlqNfe = Status_simNao.Sim Msg('Atenção! Cliente com emissão fiscal bloqueado no cadastro, procure saber o motivo antes de desbloquear!') Else GravaNotaTemporariaVenda.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, '65') &tmpNFeCod = trim(str(EmpCod)) + trim(Str(FilCod)) + trim(str(PedCod)) pdvM_emiteNFCe.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &tmpNFeCod ) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAABREESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 //wpAbrirPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Abrir Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAABREESTOQUE]') EndIF Else msg('Opção Disponível somente pedido diferentes de Abertos!') EndiF EndSub Sub 'Do FecharEstoquePedido' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 if not PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) &IsClienteComCredito = true do 'VerificaCreditoCliente' IF LctAtuEst in (Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada, Status_EntradaSaida.Saida) &IsSemEstoque = false If &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' //FECHA PEDIDO SOMENTE COM ESTOQUE &IsSemEstoque = VerificaProdutoSemEstoque.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIf Do Case Case &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' and &IsSemEstoque = true msg('No pedido existe produtos que não possuem estoque suficiente! [CONF58]') Case &IsClienteComCredito = false msg('Crédito do cliente atingido, Solicite liberação de limite crédito para o pedido! [CONF210]') Case &FechamentoIntegradoEstoque = 'S' wpFecharPedidoVendaIntegrado.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Case &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' and (PedCliCrd <> 999999999.99) and (PedStsCrd <> Status_Autorizado.AUTORIZADO and LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim)//Não Liberado Crédito do Pedido msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta Liberação do Crédito! [CONF23]') Otherwise wpFecharPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh EndCase Else wpFecharPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh EndIf Else msg('Pedido já Fechado ou Cancelado!') EndIF Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF EndSub Sub 'Do FecharFinanceiroPedido' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 FechaFinanceiroPedidoVenda.Call(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, false) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 FechaFinanceiroPedidoVenda.Call(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, false) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Criticaspedido' // wpCriticasPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Criticaspedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarPedido' If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO msg('Somente Pedidos Abertos podem ser Cancelados!') Else &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDACANCELARPEDIDO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) RetornaIsPodeAlterar.Call('', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsAutorizado) If &AutNiv > 0 if &IsAutorizado = true wpCancelarPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh Else msg('Você não tem acesso para alterar Excluir Pedido nesse Status!') EndIF else msg('Usuário Não Autorizado a Rotina de Cancelar Pedido de Venda. [VENDACANCELARPEDIDO]') endif EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do HistoricoCliente' wwhistoricoCliente.Link(PedCliCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFIN" &PedStsFin.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDVENCOD" &PedVenCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &PedDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTATUSAL" &LctAtuSal.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDBLQ" &PedBlq.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &PedDtaFat1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaFat_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTS", "", not &PedSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTSFIN", "", not &PedStsFin.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedStsFin, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLICOD", "", not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDVENCOD", "", not &PedVenCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedVenCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDDTAEMS", "", not (&PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PedDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &PedDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTTIP", "", not &LctTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTATUSAL", "", not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctAtuSal, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDBLQ", "", not &PedBlq.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedBlq, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &ImprimirPedido.Click wpImprimirPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click wpEnviaPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Sub 'VerificaCreditoCliente' //Controla Credito do Cliente // If LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria // &DebitoMoeda = RetornaCreditoDisponivelCliente.UDP(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCliCod) // // If (&DebitoMoeda + PedVlrLiq) > PedCliCrd // &ValorLiberadoMoeda = RetornaValorAutorizadoPedido.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedCliCod) // // If &ValorLiberadoMoeda < PedVlrLiq // &IsClienteComCredito = false // EndIF // EndIF // EndIf EndSub
